Our Services

Expert Electrical & ELV Services

We provide expert E&I installations, ELV systems, LEW services, switchboard testing, and technical manpower to meet all industrial electrical needs.

⚡

All Kind of E&I Installation Works

Comprehensive electrical and instrumentation installations for commercial, industrial, and residential projects across Singapore.

Learn more →
📡

ELV System Installation Works

Professional Extra Low Voltage system installations including CCTV, access control, fire alarm, PA systems, and structured cabling.

Learn more →
👷

Technical Manpower Supply

Supplying certified and experienced electrical technicians and engineers to supplement your project workforce on demand.

Learn more →
🔌

Design & Supply of LV Switchboards

Custom-designed and supplied low voltage switchboards meeting all regulatory standards for your specific project requirements.

Learn more →
📋

LEW Services

Licensed Electrical Worker services for inspection, testing, commissioning, and maintenance of electrical installations.

Learn more →
🏭

EMA Licensing for Electrical & Generator Works

EMA-compliant licensing services for electrical and generator installation works, ensuring full regulatory compliance.

Learn more →
🔬

HT & LT Switchboard Testing

Precision testing and commissioning of High Tension and Low Tension switchboards ensuring safe and reliable operation.

Learn more →

Skilled, Licensed, Reliable & Complete
